mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.uid2 AS "uid2.id", a.money AS "money", a.info AS "info", a.tui_time AS "tuiTime", a.shou_time AS "shouTime", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex",
uid2.nickname AS "uid2.nickname", uid2.icon AS "uid2.icon", uid2.sex AS "uid2.sex"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid LEFT JOIN t_member uid2 ON uid2.id = a.uid2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_zhuangzhang( id, uid, uid2, money, info, tui_time, shou_time, del_flag, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{uid2.id}, #{money}, #{info}, #{tuiTime}, #{shouTime}, #{delFlag}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_zhuangzhang SET uid = #{u.id}, uid2 = #{uid2.id}, money = #{money}, info = #{info}, tui_time = #{tuiTime}, shou_time = #{shouTime}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
